title: Johnny Yuma
writer: Sauro Scavolini, Giovanni Simonelli, Fernando Di Leo
actors: Mark Damon, Lawrence Dobkin, Rosalba Neri
plot: A conniving wife has her husband murdered, and also plans to kill his nephew, the only heir, with the assistance of her ex-lover. When she tries to double-cross the ex-lover, he and the heir team up and kill her bodyguards.
